text.message: black, im thinking i want the 9 5 10. If you take the 5 4 11 that opens up hella dots for both of us. I'll trade you my sheep to make up for you not getting one. if not its cool, up to you

yeah, you gotta win too, good luck!
ok, i owe you a sheep better or worse then
we can each het a good spot!
you can rob me, we gotta play our own games

do you want to switch blue? you go for army i go for road?

ill trade you sheep so they stop robbing me
